summary: BidBlitz Händler-Gutscheine System Testing Complete - All features verified: 1) /haendler-gutscheine page loads correctly with Premium Partners displayed first with golden border and badge, 2) 'Jetzt bieten' button navigates correctly to /auctions/mv-XXXXX, 3) Admin Panel Händler-Gutscheine Tab works with Premium price (€5-€20) and duration settings, 4) All translations present for MerchantVouchersPage (DE, EN, EL, TR, AR, FR, IT, PT, RU, ZH) and BidBlitzPay (including Greek), 5) Mobile view of Admin Panel is well-organized with categorized menu

premium_partners_displayed_first.description: Premium Partners appear at top with golden border and 'Premium Partner' badge

details.sorting: Premium first, then by voucher count

admin_panel_haendler_gutscheine_tab.description: Admin Panel has Händler-Gutscheine tab with Gutscheine and Premium Partner sub-tabs

admin_premium_price_setting.description: Admin can set Premium price (€5-€20) and duration (months)

merchant_vouchers_translations.description: MerchantVouchersPage has translations for all 10 required languages

admin_mobile_view.description: Admin Panel mobile view is well-organized with categorized menu

critical_code_review_comments: MerchantVouchersPage.js: All 10 language translations present (de, en, el, tr, ar, fr, it, pt, ru, zh) with complete key fields
BidBlitzPay.jsx: Greek (el) translations added with all key fields including sendMoney, requestMoney, cashback features
AdminMerchantVouchers.js: Premium price input with min=5 max=20 validation, duration in months, total calculation displayed
Admin.js lines 1279-1344: Mobile menu well-organized with categorized tabs and responsive grid layout
merchant_vouchers.py: SetPremiumRequest model includes price field (€5-€20), premium_total_paid calculated and stored
context_for_next_testing_agent: Händler-Gutscheine System fully tested: 1) /haendler-gutscheine page shows Premium Partners first with golden border and Crown badge, 2) 'Jetzt bieten' navigates to /auctions/mv-{id}, 3) Admin Panel has Händler-Gutscheine tab with Premium price (€5-€20) and duration settings, 4) All translations present for 10 languages in MerchantVouchersPage and Greek in BidBlitzPay, 5) Mobile Admin view has categorized menu with Gutscheine & Codes section
